steps.title: Calculate total propellant burned
steps.content:
The rocket started with 486,000 kg and had 391,680 kg remaining after 18 seconds. The total amount burned is:
$$486,000 - 391,680 = 94,320 \text{ kg}$$

steps.title: Divide by time to find average burn rate
steps.content:
Average burn rate per second is:
$$\frac{94,320}{18} = 5,240 \text{ kg/second}$$
That matches the correct answer: A is correct.
